title: Enrollment Day
description: Your first day at Arcane Card Kingdom. Get acquainted with your surroundings and meet your fellow students.

objectives.description: Speak with Aria in the Courtyard
Visit the Grand Library and speak with Master Aldric
Explore the Academy Market and meet Zephyr

title: Aria's Challenge
description: Aria has challenged you to a card duel. Prove your worth by defeating her on the Dueling Grounds.

objectives.description: Defeat Aria in a card duel

title: The Lost Tome
description: Master Aldric has lost a precious tome somewhere in the Academy. He asks for your help finding it.

objectives.description: Ask Zephyr if they've seen the tome
Return the tome to Master Aldric
